input.headline: The Interview Sir Anthony Hopkins: I turn turmoil into energy

raw.headline: The Interview Sir Anthony Hopkins: I turn turmoil into energy

winner: Why did Sir Anthony Hopkins refuse to audition for *The Lion King*? He said he already had enough roles turning turmoil into energy—like that time he played a lion who got stuck in a elevator with a very dramatic zebra.

candidates.text: Why did Sir Anthony Hopkins bring a flashlight to the interview? He heard the turmoil was *illuminating*!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative wordplay on 'illuminating' with a specific reference to the headline's 'turmoil,' concise and surprising."}

candidates.text: Why did Sir Anthony Hopkins refuse to audition for *The Lion King*? He said he already had enough roles turning turmoil into energy—like that time he played a lion who got stuck in a elevator with a very dramatic zebra.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative twist on the headline with a specific, surprising scenario involving Sir Anthony Hopkins and a dramatic zebra in an elevator."}

candidates.text: Sir Anthony Hopkins once told me, "I turn turmoil into energy." I nodded along, but inside I was just thinking about how he must have a very good fan.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "Surprising twist on the quote with a clever, specific image of a fan."}

candidates.text: Anthony turned a toddler's tantrum into a 10/10 workout.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on Hopkins' quote, concise and specific with a playful image."}

candidates.text: Sir Anthony Hopkins just announced he's turning his energy into turmoil—his new autobiography is titled "How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love the Chaos.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on the headline with a clever play on words and specific reference to an autobiography title."}
